title: Latte Spoons Long Handle Coffee Spoons Teaspoons Set of 6 Stainless Steel 7.8Inches Tea Spoon Mixing Stirring Spoon for Latte Coffee Espresso Iced Tea Milk Shake Ice Cream Sundeas Cool Drinking
features: 【PREMIUM QUALITY】: Our 6-piece spoon with long handle, made of high quality stainless steel, very durable and sturdy as well as good quality, will last for many years.

【Length】: 198 mm (7.8 inches) for the entire length, perfect for most glasses and jugs. Also used as ice cream spoon, iced tea spoon, coffee mixing spoon and cocktail mixing spoon. And long enough for large coffee cups. Suitable for bar, home, party.
【LIFESTYLE】: Luxurious and stylish design with ergonomic feel, high quality mirror smooth surface and smooth edge - definitely no rough spots. Enjoy your leisure time this summer!
【Washing】: Dishwasher safe (no strong alkaline, strong acidic or strong oxidizing cleaner), very firm and durable.
【Mirror finish】: modern design with comfortable handling, simple and elegant with reflective mirror finish, easy to match different types of cutlery or cutlery
description: Product Description Stainless Steel Ice Tea Spoon Mixing Ice Cream Cocktail Stirring Tea Coffee Milkshake Cold Drink Enjoy your delicious food and drinks in your free time with our long-handled spoons Features: Durable stainless steel construction and easy to clean. L Long handle, more comfortable to use. Q Square spoon head, can easily stir the ice, tea or drinking. V Can be used as an ice cream spoon, mixing spoon, cocktail spoon, ice tea spoon, etc ust utensil for bar, home and party. Size: Length: 7.8 inches, width: 1.1 inches (each teaspoon). You will receive: 6 Long Handled Teaspoons Note: Please wash these ice cream spoons the first time. Throw them in the dishwasher after each use, wipe off the water and store them in a dry place, and they will come out like new. Material: Made of high quality stainless steel, very durable and robust. The perfect durable handle, sturdy and comfortable to use. Design: Luxurious and stylish design with ergonomic feel, high quality mirror smooth surface and smooth edge. Package contents: This set of 6 long handled spoons has a minimalist look and a classic design that will compliment any kitchen decor. Please note: Please wash the spoon with the long handle with warm soapy water before first use to remove any residue of the manufacturing processPlease clean and dry the iced tea spoon after using for your healthy daily use. Store in a dry place to ensure its durability
